package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for db_query_argument_erased_to_any: Concrete DB arguments erased to `any` or `interface{}` immediately before query execution.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule023NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule023NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule023NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario023Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule023NegativeService, input Rule023NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
